text_original: All things are produced by the Dao, and nourished by its outflowing operation.
text_normalized: All things are produced by the Dao, and nourished by its outflowing operation.

text_original: They receive their forms according to the nature of each, and are completed according to the circumstances of their condition.
text_normalized: They receive their forms according to the nature of each, and are completed according to the circumstances of their condition.

text_original: Therefore all things without exception honour the Dao, and exalt its outflowing operation.
text_normalized: Therefore all things without exception honour the Dao, and exalt its outflowing operation.

text_original: This honouring of the Dao and exalting of its operation is not the result of any ordination, but always a spontaneous tribute.
text_normalized: This honouring of the Dao and exalting of its operation is not the result of any ordination, but always a spontaneous tribute.

text_original: Thus it is that the Dao produces (all things), nourishes them, brings them to their full growth, nurses them, completes them, matures them, maintains them, and overspreads them.
text_normalized: Thus it is that the Dao produces (all things), nourishes them, brings them to their full growth, nurses them, completes them, matures them, maintains them, and overspreads them.

text_original: It produces them and makes no claim to the possession of them; it carries them through their processes and does not vaunt its ability in doing so; it brings them to maturity and exercises no control over them; - this is called its mysterious operation.
text_normalized: It produces them and makes no claim to the possession of them; it carries them through their processes and does not vaunt its ability in doing so; it brings them to maturity and exercises no control over them; - this is called its mysterious operation.
